provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the High Court (Simiyu Sub-Registry Establishment) Order, 2025 and shall come into force on the 2 nd day of January, 2026.

provisions.title: Establishment of sub-registry
provisions.content: There is hereby established the High Court Sub Registry for Simiyu.
